title: FTB X EMI Compat
description: This project adds a compatibility layer providing integration between FTB mods (like FTB Quests) and the EMI (Item and Recipe Viewer).
body:
# FTB x EMI compat

A compatibility layer providing integration between FTB mods (like FTB Quests) and the EMI (Item and Recipe Viewer).

## Installation
Just drop the jar file into your Minecraft **mods** folder.

## Requirements
To use this mod, the following are required:
- **Fabric Loader**
- **Fabric API**
- **EMI**
- **FTB Quests**
- **FTB Library**
- **Architectury API**
